price: Sie sagten: „Unser Herr weiß (es), wir sind wirklich zu euch gesandt.
arabic: قَالُواْ رَبُّنَا يَعۡلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ لَمُرۡسَلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: qālū rabbunā yaʿlamu innā ilaykum lamur'salūna
